name: Soft Molasses Apple Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
2. In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, baking soda, and salt. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, cream butter and granulated sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Beat in egg and vanilla extract until well combined.
5. Gradually stir in molasses.
6. Add brown sugar and apples to the batter; mix until all ingredients are incorporated.
7. Stir in flour mixture until just combined.
8. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto prepared baking sheet, spacing cookies about 2 inches apart.
9. Bake for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown.
10. Allow cookies to cool on wire rack before serving.
